title: Manifest Noctalia Plugin
description: The schema of how the noctalia manifest is.

id.description: The unique identifier for your plugin. NOTE: This id MUST be the same value as the folder of the plugin.

name.description: Human-readable plugin name that is displayed in the UI.

version.description: The version number of this plugin. Bump this version up when updating the qml code of the plugin!

minNoctaliaVersion.description: The minimum version of noctalia that the plugin requires to run. Some features have come out later than others, always check that this is correct!

author.description: The name / username of the author.

license.description: The license this plugin is under. The noctalia-plugins repository is under the MIT license.

repository.description: The git repository for your plugin.

description.description: A brief description of what the plugin does. Recommended to keep this under 100 characters.
examples: My very cool plugin, that does this thing, and that thing.

entryPoints.description: Which components your plugin provides. At least one entry point must be specified!

controlCenterWidget.description: Entrypoint for the control center widget.

desktopWidgetSettings.description: Entrypoint for the desktop widget settings.

plugins.description: The plugins that must be installed for this plugin to work.

metadata.description: The metadata that your plugin has

commandPrefix.description: The command prefix used to activate the plugins launcher provider.

defaultSettings.description: The default values for your plugin.
